result.name: Lirael the Wavecaller
result.description: Lirael is a striking figure with shimmering blue skin that reflects the light like water. Her hair flows like waves, and she wears a fitted leather vest adorned with symbols of the sea. Often seen with a piece of glowing crystal in hand, she embodies the mysteries of the ocean, drawing adventurers into her world of enchantment and danger.

sections.name: Lirael the Wavecaller
sections.motive: To uncover ancient secrets of the sea and harness their power
sections.combat: Uses water-based spells to control the battlefield, preferring to incapacitate rather than kill
sections.interaction: Charming and enigmatic, often draws others in with her captivating stories and knowledge of the ocean
sections.use: As a quest giver or ally, she can provide insights into aquatic mysteries or lead players to hidden treasures
sections.gm_intrusion: A sudden storm conjured by Lirael disrupts the players' plans, forcing them to adapt quickly
sections.loot: Rare sea crystals and ancient scrolls detailing forgotten water magic
